DOMAIN: customer_support
TASK: We're interested in purchasing 200 enterprise licenses but our procurement process requires specific technical validation before we can issue a PO. We need: (1) volume pricing for 200 seats with multi-year discount options, (2) a completed CAIQ (Consensus Assessments Initiative Questionnaire) v4 for our cloud security review, (3) evidence that your infrastructure is FedRAMP Moderate authorized OR equivalent (our federal contracting work requires this), (4) confirmation that your platform supports data residency in EU-only regions (we have GDPR Article 44 transfer restriction requirements), (5) a technical architecture overview showing how tenant isolation works at the infrastructure level (not just logical separation), and (6) a meeting with your security team to discuss the pen-test finding our red team discovered during the evaluation (reflected XSS in your admin panel's search function). Our evaluation deadline is April 15th — if we don't have all 6 items by then, procurement defaults to your competitor who already passed our security review.
